channel.title: Multimodal Communication
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Multimodal Communication

item.title: Introduction to the special issue
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0113

item.title: Digital writing, recreated orality, and identity: domestication and exoticization of multilingual speech on Chinese social media
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0114

item.title: Geographies of discourse revisited
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0112

item.title: Multimodal creativity and identity in digital discourse: meme practices in China
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0101

item.title: Mind maps as multimodal and multilingual literacy practices in Chinese private universities
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0110

item.title: Dialogues of materiality: unravelling the agency of discourse and objects
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0105

item.title: Visualizing identity: multimodal and multilingual practices in international student organizations’ on-campus artifacts
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0100

item.title: Moin Moin is schon Gesabbel: constructing Northern German identity in commercial Instagram posts
item.description: Article by Frederike Schram DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0099
